patterns.description: Multiple configuration files (models.yaml, workers.yaml, lanes.yaml, providers.yaml) accessed frequently with high session counts, indicating complex configuration management needs
patterns.recommendation: Implement configuration schema validation, create a unified config loader with caching, and establish configuration versioning to reduce access overhead

patterns.description: Core dispatch functionality (tasks.py, dispatch_cmd.py, dispatch/run.py, __main__.py) shows high engagement with 17, 5, 3, 4 sessions respectively
patterns.recommendation: Refactor dispatch logic into modular components with clear separation of concerns, implement dispatch pipeline visualization, and add comprehensive logging for debugging

patterns.description: Skill documentation and routing files (SKILL.md files, delegation-enforcement.md, routing.md, lane_policy.py, resolve.py) show systematic development across multiple skills
patterns.recommendation: Create a skill registry pattern with automated documentation generation, implement routing rule validation, and establish skill composition patterns

patterns.description: Doctor command and test files (doctor_cmd.py, test_doctor.py) indicate focus on system health monitoring and validation
patterns.recommendation: Expand diagnostic coverage to other components, implement automated health checks, and create a self-healing mechanism for common issues

patterns.description: Migration documentation (ZAI_TO_OPENCODE_GO_MIGRATION.md) and planning documents show ongoing architectural evolution
patterns.recommendation: Create a migration checklist with rollback procedures, establish feature flags for gradual migration, and document migration progress with clear milestones
